Represent the classification evidence using minimal and concise Description Logic statements.

- In <dl_explanation>, explain exactly how the specific assertions in the ABox satisfy the formal axioms in the TBox to correctly classify the Target Image.

# HOW TO INTERPRET THE STATEMENTS
- [Class] sqsubseteq hasVisualFeature([Feature]) means: images of this class tend to have this visual feature in the provided examples (necessary condition)
- hasVisualFeature([Feature]) sqsubseteq [Class] means: observing this visual feature is enough to classify the image as from this class in the provided examples (sufficient condition)
- [Class] equiv hasVisualFeature([F1]) and hasVisualFeature([F2]) means: this combination of features defines this class in the provided examples (necessary and sufficient condition)

- Do not use hidden properties, external knowledge, or speculation.
- Treat all axioms as visually grounded in the provided examples.
- Keep the output concise.

- [Class] equiv hasVisualFeature([F1]) and hasVisualFeature([F2])

raw_response_text:
```xml
<tbox>
    <!-- Class 45 (Orange-yellow flowers with red/orange centers and elongated petals) -->
    [Class_45] sqsubseteq hasVisualFeature([bright_orange_yellow_petals]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([red_orange_center]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([elongated_petals]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([clustered_flowers_on_stem]).

    <!-- Class 44 (Purple flowers with white centers and dark purple/pink stripes) -->
    [Class_44] sqsubseteq hasVisualFeature([deep_purple_petals]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([white_center]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([dark_purple_stripes]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([rounded_petals]).

    <!-- Class 77 (Pink lotus-like flowers with broad, layered petals and yellow centers) -->
    [Class_77] equiv hasVisualFeature([pale_pink_broad_petals]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([layered_petals]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([yellow_center]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([large_flower_size]).
</tbox>

<abox>
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [bright_yellow_petals]).
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [small_center]).
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [clustered_flowers]).
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [elongated_petals]).
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [no_purple_stripes]).
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [no_layered_structure]).
</abox>

<dl_explanation>
    The Target Image exhibits bright yellow petals and elongated petals, which align with the necessary and sufficient conditions for Class 45. It lacks the purple petals, white centers, and dark stripes characteristic of Class 44, and it does not have the broad, layered petals or yellow center typical of Class 77.

    The observed features in the Target Image (bright yellow petals, elongated petals, and clustered flowers) satisfy the TBox axioms for Class 45, confirming that this image belongs to Class 45.
</dl_explanation>

<response>45</response>
```

raw_response_text:
```xml
<tbox>
    <!-- Class 44 (Purple flowers with white centers and dark centers) -->
    [Class_44] sqsubseteq hasVisualFeature([deep_purple_petal]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([white_veined_center]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([dark_brown_stamen_center]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([petal_outline_with_ruffled_edges])

    <!-- Class 45 (Orange/yellow flowers with red/orange centers) -->
    [Class_45] sqsubseteq hasVisualFeature([bright_orange_petal]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([red_orange_center]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([petal_with_rounded_edges])

    <!-- Class 77 (Pink lotus-like flowers with yellow centers) -->
    [Class_77] sqsubseteq hasVisualFeature([pink_petal]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([yellow_center_stamen]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([large_petal_spread]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([smooth_petal_edges])
</tbox>

<abox>
    <!-- Observed features in Target Image -->
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [deep_purple_petal])
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [white_veined_center])
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [dark_brown_stamen_center])
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [petal_outline_with_ruffled_edges])
</abox>

<dl_explanation>
    The Target Image exhibits deep purple petals, a white-veined center, a dark brown stamen center, and ruffled petal edges. These features directly match the necessary and sufficient conditions for [Class_44] as defined in the TBox. The bright orange or yellow petals and red/orange centers of [Class_45] are absent, and the pink petals with yellow centers of [Class_77] are also not present. Thus, the Target Image satisfies the axioms for [Class_44].
</dl_explanation>

<response>44</response>
```
